     the Fermi energy is     3.1276 ev

!    total energy              =   -8185.04683502 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          3.9E-10 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.27584999 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =   -8184.77098503 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -201937.76890632 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  101870.29994042 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -3152.55578266 Ry
     ewald contribution        =   95037.20266013 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -1.94889660 Ry
